title: The Big Cheese Mouse Out Mini-Sonic Repellent – Ultrasonic Pest Repeller – Round-the-Clock Mouse Deterrent that Prevents Return - Rodent Control Product – Mouse Repeller Plug In, Pet Safe – 3 Pack
features: ULTIMATE MOUSE DETERRENT – Experience effective round-the-clock ultrasonic pest repeller protection against rats and mice with the mini-sonic mouse plug-in repellent. These units release undetectable high-pitched sound waves that repel rodents, making them ideal for any indoor home or workplace

VERSATILE & EFFECTIVE – Each rodent repellent unit is designed for single room coverage. For larger spaces, use multiple units to enhance pest control. Compact and discreet, this plug-in deterrence fits easily into standard sockets, minimising obstruction while efficiently keeping rodents at bay

HOME & PET SAFE – Ideal for family homes, the ultrasonic pest repeller provides poison-free rodent control that’s inaudible to humans, cats and dogs. Perfect for kitchens and prep areas, it offers a chemical-free pest defence, ensuring a humane and reliable repellent solution for a rodent-free home

READY TO USE – Each pack includes 3 mini-sonic units, ready to be plugged in for complete indoor coverage. Simply plug in the device to enjoy easy and continuous protection against rodents. Ideal for homes, garages, offices and other rodent-prone areas

RODENT CONTROL MADE EASY – The Big Cheese ultrasonic pest control repellent products provide continuous protection from rodents without using poison. Safe for children and non-rodent pets, they emit sound waves inaudible to humans, offering a humane and effective solution for keeping rodents away
